subject: Introduction Email
body:
Hi there,

Perfect for reaching out to prospects you haven't met before. Friendly and conversational.

I came across your company while researching your region prospects and wanted to see if you are open to a quick chat about verified lead generation. I help teams like yours turn qualified connections into real meetings with no extra tools required.

Would you be available for a 10-minute call this week?

Best,
Your Name

I'll follow up with you in a few days if I don't hear back. Looking forward to connecting!
